patients.title: Patient Directory
patients.subtitle: Manage patient demographics and emergency contacts.
patients.delete_hint: Open Action (⋯) on a row and choose Delete to permanently remove a patient record.
patients.search_ph: Type name, patient ID, or phone number…
patients.delete_msg: This permanently deletes {{name}} and related records. This cannot be undone.

laboratory.title: Laboratory Registry
laboratory.subtitle: All test results — use LIMS for requests, samples & panels.
laboratory.recall_prompt: Optional note for the audit log (reason for return):
laboratory.recall_confirm: Return this line for correction? If linked to a billed order you will open validate-by-code; otherwise Lab templates will open.

pharmacy.empty_low_stock: All pharmacy products are above reorder level.
pharmacy.empty_expiring: No medicines expiring within the next 30 days.
pharmacy.dispense_confirm: Mark this medication line as dispensed?
pharmacy.sync_inventory_confirm: Add new pharmacy catalog items to stock and remove orphan SKUs? Existing quantities are kept.
pharmacy.upload_products_confirm: Import medications and tariffs from the selected file? Existing items with the same name will be updated.
pharmacy.empty_dispensed: No medications dispensed on this day.
pharmacy.sales_empty: No pharmacy sales recorded for this day.
pharmacy.expiry_empty: No medicines expiring in this window.

catalog.title: Service Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Hospital-wide services and {{currency}} tariffs — search, filter by department, and manage prices.
catalog.import_panel_subtitle: Load standard XAF price lists by department. Choose the bundle that matches your section.
catalog.import_dept_radiology_hint: X-ray, ultrasound, CT, MRI and related imaging
catalog.search_ph: Search by name, department, category, or price…
catalog.empty_catalog: No services in the catalog yet. Add a service or import a tariff.
catalog.import_pharmacy_file_desc: Excel, CSV, PDF, or Word — updates matching medication names.
catalog.import_pharmacy_file_confirm: Import medications and XAF tariffs from the selected file? Existing items with the same name will be updated.
catalog.import_upload_desc: Excel, CSV, PDF, or Word — updates matching items by name.
catalog.import_lab_file_confirm: Import laboratory tests and XAF tariffs from the selected file? Existing tests with the same name will be updated.
catalog.import_rad_file_confirm: Import imaging exams and XAF tariffs from the selected file? Existing exams with the same name will be updated.
catalog.import_pharmacy_file_failed: Pharmacy file import failed. Check the file format and try again.
catalog.import_rad_desc: Basic imaging tariff into Scans & Imaging.
catalog.import_rad_confirm: Import ultrasound/X-ray/ECG tariff into Scans & Imaging?
catalog.import_scan_desc: Advanced imaging tariff; duplicates keep radiology price.
catalog.import_scan_confirm: Import CT/MRI/nuclear tariff? Duplicates keep radiology price.
catalog.import_merge_desc: Combine radiology + scan rows and remove duplicates.
catalog.import_merge_confirm: Merge radiology + scan, remove duplicates (radiology kept)?

inventory.title: Inventory & Supplies
inventory.subtitle: Centralized stock control and SKU tracking.
inventory.import_catalog_confirm: Import all medications from the Pharmacy service catalog into this stock registry?
inventory.apply_stock_confirm: Apply opening stock from the pharmacy stock sheet? This overwrites quantities for matched SKUs.

staff.title: Staff Directory
staff.subtitle: Manage hospital employees and user accounts.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: Staff directory — manage accounts, roles, and departments.
employees.search_ph: Search name, username, phone, email, role, department…
employees.delete_confirm: Permanently delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
employees.export_scope_hint: Select the fields to include in the export.
employees.export_all_rows: All employees in the directory will be exported.

uiKit.title: UI design system
uiKit.subtitle: Reference for buttons, forms, modals, and surface components.
uiKit.sample_email_hint: Optional hint text below the field.
uiKit.sample_validation_error: Please enter a valid email address.
uiKit.modal_subtitle: Standard dialog with focus trap and footer actions.
uiKit.modal_body: Use ModalCancelButton and ModalSubmitButton in footers. Size guide: sm · md · lg · xl · workspace.

employee_password.title: Reset employee password
employee_password.subtitle: Set a new login password for hospital staff — governed by Access Control permission employee.password.manage.
employee_password.notice_body: Only roles granted Employees: set & reset staff login passwords can use this screen. System Admin and Super Admin accounts are managed under System Users.
employee_password.empty: No employees available for password reset with your permissions.
employee_password.modal_hint: Minimum 6 characters. Share the new password securely with the employee.
employee_password.err_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.

users.title: System Users
users.subtitle: Admin and Super Admin login accounts — separate from clinical and operational staff.
users.hint: Hospital staff (doctors, nurses, cashiers, etc.) are managed under Employees. Only Admin and Super Admin accounts appear here.
users.delete_confirm: Permanently delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.

doctors.title: Doctors Directory
doctors.subtitle: Manage medical staff and departmental assignments.
doctors.empty: No doctors found. Add your first doctor to get started.
doctors.default_bio: Medical specialist dedicated to patient care and clinical excellence.

addStaff.title: Add New Employee
addStaff.subtitle: Create a staff account with login credentials.
addStaff.err_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.

addInventorySku.title: Add New SKU
addInventorySku.subtitle: Register a product in the hospital stock registry.

registerPatient.title: Register New Patient
registerPatient.subtitle: Hospital patient ID is assigned automatically on save.
registerPatient.emergency_hint: Person to call in an emergency (may differ from next of kin)
registerPatient.portal_hint: Allow the patient to sign in to view records and appointments
registerPatient.portal_enable_hint: Patient receives login credentials at the email address above.
registerPatient.credit_hint: Open a hospital credit line at registration
registerPatient.credit_open_hint: Creates an active credit account linked to this patient.
registerPatient.credit_emergency_hint: Flags the credit account for pending emergency payment.
registerPatient.insurance_hint: Manual policy entry or carrier API lookup
registerPatient.err_email_portal: Email is required when patient portal access is enabled.
registerPatient.err_insurance_pct: Choose an insurer coverage percentage (70–100%) or enter a custom value.
registerPatient.err_dob_format: Enter a valid date of birth as DD/MM/YYYY.
registerPatient.err_phone_format: Enter a valid phone number (digits only, optional + at the start).
registerPatient.err_nok_phone_format: Next of kin phone must be a valid phone number.
registerPatient.err_emerg_phone_format: Emergency contact phone must be a valid phone number.
registerPatient.err_email_format: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com).

addDoctor.title: Add Doctor
addDoctor.subtitle: Creates a staff account with a doctor role.
addDoctor.bio_ph: Short clinical profile shown on the directory card…
addDoctor.err_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
addDoctor.err_specialisation: Specialisation is required for doctor roles.

patientInsurance.err_required: Carrier and insurance card ID are required.
patientInsurance.auto_save_hint: Verified policies are saved automatically when you register the patient.

employeeDoctor.departments_hint: Select all clinical units this doctor works in. The first selected is primary.
employeeDoctor.specialisations_doctor_hint: Select all specialties. The first selected is primary.
employeeDoctor.specialisations_staff_hint: Click to add or remove specialties for this staff member. The first selected is primary.
employeeDoctor.selected_hint: Selected: {{list}}. Click a highlighted chip again to remove it.

employeeProfile.title: Profile picture
employeeProfile.hint: Upload a staff photo or use an emoji avatar.

cashier_odoo.search_no_results: No patients, bills, or receipts found.
cashier_odoo.profile_bio_hint: Brief description shown on staff profiles and rosters
cashier_odoo.profile_bio_placeholder: e.g. Senior cashier, front desk lead…
cashier_odoo.pos_intro: Issue a payment ticket, collect cash or mobile money, and print a receipt.
cashier_odoo.insurance_empty: No insurance claims configured for this facility.
cashier_odoo.refund_notice_body: All refund requests are logged and require a valid reason. Cash refunds above 50,000 FCFA need countersignature.
cashier_odoo.refund_empty: No refund requests match your filters.
cashier_odoo.refund_find_required: Enter a bill number or patient name first.
cashier_odoo.refund_bill_not_found: No bill found with that number.
cashier_odoo.refund_bill_lookup_failed: Could not look up that bill. Refresh the page and try again.
cashier_odoo.refund_already_done: This bill was already refunded ({{ref}}). No further refund is available.
cashier_odoo.refund_none_left: No refundable balance remains on this bill.
cashier_odoo.refund_exceeds_available: Refund amount exceeds available balance on this bill.
cashier_odoo.pos_card_err_unknown_card: Could not identify card type. Check the number.
cashier_odoo.pos_card_err_invalid_length: Card number length is invalid for this card type.
cashier_odoo.pos_card_err_holder_required: Enter the name on the card.
cashier_odoo.pos_card_err_auth_required: Enter the POS approval / auth code.
cashier_odoo.bills_open_hint: View bill — Ctrl+click to open print slip
cashier_odoo.invoice_err_lines: Add at least one line item.
cashier_odoo.claim_err_amount: Claim amount must be greater than zero.
cashier_odoo.ins_empty: No insurance claims match your filters.
